audit_items.proof_trace: Memory allocated by strdup() at line 4629 is not freed on error return paths at lines 4647 (invalid IPv6) and 4665 (invalid port). Normal path correctly frees at line 4678.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker sends malformed interface strings with invalid IPv6 format or non-numeric ports repeatedly, causing memory leaks that accumulate to denial of service.
